content: Imagine you have a magic notebook that can keep track of who gave toys to whom, without needing a grown-up to watch. This magic notebook is called a blockchain, and it helps people trade things safely without a bank or boss. Every time someone gives a toy, the notebook makes a new page with the details, and everyone gets the same copy. When a new page is added, all the notebooks check to make sure it matches, so nobody can cheat or change the story. The notebooks are connected through computers all over the world, sharing and comparing pages all the time. To add a new page, the computers have to solve a tricky puzzle that takes a lot of work, making it very hard to cheat. Because everyone can see all the pages and checks the puzzle, the system stays honest and safe. That’s how blockchain keeps track of trades without needing a bank or a boss!
